name: Science to Consumers, Inc.
summary: Science to Consumers, Inc., a development stage company, focuses on marketing and selling formulated anti-aging cream products under the DermaLastyl name; and distributing Argan oil products. It intends to sell its products to individual customers and commercial customers, such as spas, stores, and massage therapy offices. The company was formerly known as Argan Beauty Corporation and changed its name to Science to Consumers, Inc. in December 2014. Science to Consumers, Inc. was founded in 2013 and is based in Guangzhou, China.
